# Part 3 — Connect (Agent Brief)

**Restaurant:** SAIGON DISTRICT KITCHEN AND BAR  
**Language:** English only  
**Style:** Match [Eclipse di Luna](https://www.eclipsediluna.com/) — no emoji, no decorative icons  
**Your folder:** `part-3-connect/` only — do not edit `part-1-home/` or `part-2-visit/`  
**Read-only:** `shared/assets/brand/logo.jpg` (for Header stub)

---

## Your scope

Build four page groups:

- `/birthday-party`
- `/contact-us`
- `/jobs`
- `/blog` + `/blog/{slug}`

---

## Shared Contract (required)

Use the same Header, Footer, and Gift Card modal as defined in `PLAN.md` Shared Contract section. Implement a local stub copy in your folder; do not depend on Part 1 or Part 2 files.

---

## Birthday Party `/birthday-party`

1. Hero — *Birthday Party* · *Celebrate with us*
2. Packages — food tiers, drinks, time limits (placeholder copy)
3. Venue — capacity, private areas (placeholder copy)
4. Gallery — event photo placeholders
5. Inquiry form — First Name, Last Name, Email, Phone, Event Date, Time, Number of Guests, Additional Info
6. Footer

Form: front-end only; show success/error states on submit.

---

## Contact `/contact-us`

1. Hero — *Contact Us*
2. Intro paragraph
3. Form — First Name, Last Name, Email, Phone, Message
4. Footer

---

## Jobs `/jobs`

1. Hero — *We Are Hiring*
2. Intro — short copy (e.g. join our team, reach out to apply)
3. Contact block — phone and email only (no form):
   - Phone: (678) 404-7383
   - Email: parisbanhmiatl.info@gmail.com
4. Footer

No application form, uploads, or SMS opt-in.

---

## Blog `/blog` and `/blog/{slug}`

**List page:** 3+ posts with thumbnail, title, excerpt, date

**Post page:** title, date, body, optional related posts

Sample topics: pho, banh mi, Vietnamese coffee, Duluth dining

---

## Assets

| Path | Status |
|------|--------|
| `shared/assets/brand/logo.jpg` | **Provided** |
| `part-3-connect/assets/birthday/` | TBD — gallery placeholders |
| `part-3-connect/assets/blog/` | TBD — post thumbnails |

---

## Deliverables

- Working previews for all pages inside `part-3-connect/`
- At least 1 full blog post example at `/blog/sample-post`
- Local header/footer stub matching Shared Contract

---

## Out of scope

- Home, Menu, Location
- Newsletter, reservations, order online, deals, catering
- Form backend for Birthday Party and Contact only (Jobs has no form)
